# Synthetic Junos display-inheritance sample with incomplete source context.
# Missing source-group detail must remain MANUAL_REQUIRED.
[USER_1]@[HOST_1]> show configuration | display inheritance | no-more
inheritance-source missing
effective-statement system services ssh source-group unknown
effective-statement system login idle-timeout unknown
effective-statement snmp community [COMMUNITY_1] authorization unknown source-group missing
effective-statement firewall family inet filter [FILTER_1] source-prefix-list missing
apply-groups-except present source-group [GROUP_1]
